title: Autowrite Preset
description: Schema for Autowrite preset JSON files defining writing form rules, pass sequences, rubric criteria, and transformation defaults.

name.description: Display name for the preset (e.g., 'Blog Post')

description.description: One-line description of the writing form this preset targets

goals.description: Primary goals for this writing form (e.g., ['persuade', 'engage', 'inform'])

stages.description: Ordered sequence of revision passes for this form. Must start with 'diagnose'.

sentenceLength.description: Behavioral description of sentence length patterns (e.g., 'varied', 'medium-to-long', 'short-to-medium')

voice.description: Voice rules as behavioral descriptions, not scalar proxies

expectedSections.description: List of expected section names in the writing form

sectionOrder.description: How strictly the section order is enforced ('strict', 'flexible', 'progressive')

structure.description: Structural expectations for the writing form

description.description: Behavioral description of what passing this criterion looks like

weight.description: Weight in the aggregate score. All weights must sum to 1.0.

criteria.description: Scored evaluation criteria. Weights must sum to 1.0 (within 0.01 tolerance).

passing_threshold.description: Minimum aggregate score required to pass evaluation

critical_criteria.description: Criteria that are hard-fail gates. Must include 'factual_integrity' and 'voice_preservation'.

rubric.description: Evaluation rubric with weighted criteria and hard-fail gates

no_citation_invention.description: Must be true. Prohibits inventing citations or references not in the source.

no_stance_shift.description: Must be true. Prohibits silently shifting the author's argumentative position.

aggressive_rewrite_requires_explicit_req.description: When true, major rewrites require explicit user instruction.

constraints.description: Hard safety constraints for this preset

preserveVoice.description: When true, voice preservation is a first-class constraint. Must be true for all standard presets.

allowMajorRestructure.description: When true, the writing engine may reorganize the overall structure.

prioritizeClarity.description: When true, clarity improvements are prioritized over other goals.

prioritizePersuasion.description: When true, persuasive impact is elevated in revision decisions.

prioritizeConcision.description: When true, cutting unnecessary content is prioritized.

transformations.description: Default transformation behaviors for the writing engine

examples.description: Optional example texts or fragments for this writing form
